RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiffs Elvis Bokan By And Through His Guardian Ad Litem, Rebekah Bokan's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery Requests - By agreement of the parties, the motion as to Interrogatories 1,7,8,12,18 and 19 has been withdrawn and the motion as to Request for Production 7 and 8 has also been withdrawn. The court adopts the recommendation of Pro Tem Judge James Watson as to the balance of the motion as follows: Denied as to interrogatory 3, 6, 14, and 17 and request for production number 8, 9 and 11. Granted as to interrogatory 13 and request for production number 6. Request for production number 27 is granted with modifications. The date for further response is set on June 25, 2012. No sanctions are awarded. The parties will meet and confer as to a stipulated protective order for approval by the court. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Sheila Arceno, CSR # 13293 =(302/HEK)
